common.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
common.startNewChat: No active sessions found. Start a new chat!
common.selectOrCreateSession: Please select or create a session to start chatting
common.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive the selected {{count}} chats?

auth.title: Sign in to Vibe Forge
auth.subtitle: Use a configured account to continue into this workspace.
auth.generatedPasswordDescription: Find the password in the local password file, or configure fixed accounts in webAuth.accounts.

automation.title: Automation
automation.basicDesc: Describe purpose and toggle the rule on or off
automation.cronInputHint: Enter cron directly, or use weekly fields below to generate one
automation.emptyLandingDescription: Choose a common task to fill the sender below, or describe the trigger and the work to run. Sending starts a chat where AI can call tools to create it.
automation.emptyLandingPlaceholder: Describe the automation you want to create
automation.emptyLandingAttachmentInstruction: Create an automation from the context I attached. Prefer calling the available automation tools to create it; if required details are missing, ask for the missing configuration first.
automation.starterDailyDescription: Summarize progress, risks, and next steps on a schedule.
automation.starterDailyPrompt: Help me create an automation: every weekday at 9:00 AM, check the current project status and summarize yesterday's completed work, today's risks, and suggested next steps. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterHealthDescription: Run periodic checks and report when something breaks.
automation.starterHealthPrompt: Help me create an automation: every 30 minutes, check whether the current project has failing tests, build errors, or service issues. If there is a problem, create a session explaining the cause and suggested fixes. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterWeeklyDescription: Collect progress, open issues, and planning notes each week.
automation.starterWeeklyPrompt: Help me create an automation: every Friday at 5:30 PM, summarize this week's development progress, solved issues, unfinished work, and recommendations for next week. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterReminderDescription: Remind me or check specific items at the right time.
automation.starterReminderPrompt: Help me create an automation: every weekday at 6:00 PM, check whether there are unresolved todos, waiting inputs, or failed tasks, then create a session reminding me to handle them. Please use the available automation tools to create it.

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.sidebarHint: Choose a category and case, inspect the task goal, and launch a run.

knowledge.title: Project Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Manage skills, entities, flows, and rules for this project

skills.title: Skill Library
skills.desc: Maintain reusable skill definitions and usage notes.
skills.createHint: Create a skill file under .ai/skills, then refresh the page.
skills.importHint: Import skill files into .ai/skills, then refresh the page.

entities.title: Entity Library
entities.desc: Manage roles, components, and domain entities for the project.
entities.createHint: Create an entity definition file, then refresh the page.
entities.importHint: Import entity definition files, then refresh the page.

flows.title: Flow Library
flows.desc: Manage project flows and parameter definitions.
flows.createHint: Create a flow file under .ai/specs, then refresh the page.
flows.importHint: Import flow files into .ai/specs, then refresh the page.

rules.title: Rule Library
rules.desc: Maintain project conventions, constraints, and enforcement rules.
rules.createHint: Create a rule file under .ai/rules, then refresh the page.
rules.importHint: Import rule files into .ai/rules, then refresh the page.

chat.modelConfigRequired: Add a model service in config before starting a session
chat.modelConfigRequiredHelp: Add at least one model service, then retry sending from the composer.
chat.connectionError: WebSocket connection failed. Check the server and try again.
chat.connectionErrorHelp: Streaming updates stopped before the session could recover. Retry to resubscribe to the running session.
chat.connectionClosedHelp: The current stream has ended unexpectedly. Retry to reconnect and continue receiving new messages.
chat.sessionErrorHelp: Check the latest tool output or terminal logs, then continue from the most recent user message if needed.
chat.debugMockConnectionErrorMessage: Unable to reach the session stream. The websocket handshake timed out before any updates arrived.
chat.debugMockConnectionClosedMessage: The connection dropped after the assistant started responding. No further tokens will arrive until you reconnect.
chat.debugMockSessionErrorMessage: The runtime hit its session timeout while waiting for a downstream tool result and stopped this turn.
chat.permissionRequestTitleWithTool: Requesting permission to use 【{{tool}}】. Choose how to proceed.
chat.permissionConfirmOptionTooltip: Confirm the currently highlighted permission option
chat.permissionSendBlockedTooltip: A permission choice is still pending. Confirm the option above first.
chat.permissionSendBlockedError: A permission choice is still pending, so sending is temporarily disabled.

queue.steerShortcutTooltip: Queue the message until the current turn finishes
queue.nextShortcutTooltip: Queue the message and send it at the next safe point
queue.moveToSteer: Move to send after current turn
queue.moveToNext: Move to send at next safe point
queue.stopShortcutTooltip: Press Esc twice to stop the current run
queue.stopShortcutConfirm: Press Esc again to stop the current run

chat.adapterLockedTooltip: Adapters are locked after a session is created

sessionTarget.title: Session target
sessionTarget.missingResourceWarning: Choose a resource for the current mode first

chat.referenceActionsDescription: Add photos, files, and permission-related settings.
chat.referenceAttachmentsDescription: Choose images or project files as references.
chat.referencePermissionDescription: Control how tool actions are authorized.
chat.referenceImageDescription: Choose a local image and attach it to the message.
chat.referenceFileDescription: Choose files from the current project tree.
chat.selectionWarningReasonExcluded: the model is excluded by adapter rules
chat.selectionWarningReasonNotIncluded: the model is not included by adapter rules
chat.imageNotSupportedInInteraction: Images are not supported for this interaction
chat.fileNotSupportedInInteraction: Files are not supported for this interaction
chat.contextPickerDescription: Choose one or more files or folders from the current project tree.
chat.contextPickerEmpty: No items available in this directory
chat.workspaceDrawerGitUnavailable: Git is unavailable for this workspace.
chat.workspaceFileEditorResizePanel: Drag to resize file editor height
chat.availableToolsEmpty: No tools are available for this session yet.
chat.debugModeDescription: This section is visible because the current URL contains a debug query.
chat.viewInitInfo: Click the title 5 times to toggle debug mode
chat.statusBarSessionSubtitle: Track the current session workspace and git context here.
chat.statusBarDraftSubtitle: Set up the next session workspace before sending the first message.
chat.sessionWorkspaceDraftCreateWorktreeEnabl: New sessions get an isolated managed worktree.
chat.sessionWorkspaceDraftCreateWorktreeDisab: New sessions reuse the shared workspace directly.
chat.sessionWorkspaceDraftGitUnavailable: Git is unavailable for the current workspace.
chat.sessionWorkspaceCreateWorktreeSuccess: Created a managed worktree for this session.
chat.sessionWorkspaceTransferToLocalSuccess: This worktree is now retained locally.
chat.sessionWorkspaceForceDeleteDescription: This session workspace has uncommitted changes. Force delete the session and remove its bound worktree anyway?
chat.gitRemoteBranchCheckedOutInOtherWorktree: Local branch already checked out in {{path}}
chat.gitCommitDescription: This stages all current repository changes before committing.
chat.gitCommitAmendDescription: Fold into the latest commit. Current: {{subject}}
chat.gitCommitAmendUnavailableDescription: There is no existing commit to amend in this repository.
chat.gitCommitMessagePlaceholderAmend: Leave blank to keep the latest commit message
chat.gitCommitMessageAmendHint: Leave it blank to reuse the latest commit message.
chat.gitCommitNoChanges: There are no changes to commit
chat.gitCommitNoStagedChanges: There are no staged changes to commit
chat.gitAmendUnavailable: There is no commit available to amend
chat.gitForcePushDescription: Use force-with-lease for the remote branch.
chat.gitForcePushHint: Only replaces it when the remote has no newer commits.
chat.gitPushNeedsSyncOrForce: This branch is behind upstream. Sync first or enable force push.
chat.gitPushPanelUpstreamHint: The first push sets the upstream automatically.
chat.deleteSessionDesc: This will permanently remove the session and all messages. Proceed carefully.

messageActions.editInProgress: A message is already being edited. Send or cancel it first.
messageActions.recallConfirmContent: Messages after this point will be rolled back. Continue?
messageActions.forkConfirmContent: This will create a new session branch from this message. Continue?

messageFooter.copyTimestampTitle: Double-click to copy the ISO timestamp and log the message payload

chat.hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line, type / @ # for completion

help.item2: Entities can be described with index.json or README.md

config.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Fix the format before saving.

worktreeEnvironment.desc: Environment scripts run when managed worktrees are created, started, and destroyed

items.label: Model Selector Entries
items.desc: Model metadata keyed by `service` or `service,model`. Display metadata like alias/title/description only applies to exact `model` or `service,model` matches

title.label: Display Title
title.desc: Shown in the default model service dropdown

description.label: Display Description
description.desc: Shown in the default model service dropdown

apiBaseUrl.label: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.desc: Base URL for the model service API

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.desc: Access key for the model service

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.desc: Provider timeout in milliseconds. Codex uses it as stream idle timeout; Claude Code Router uses global API timeout.

maxOutputTokens.label: Max Output Tokens
maxOutputTokens.desc: Default output token cap for this service. Codex uses maxOutputTokens; Claude Code Router uses the maxtoken transformer.

items.label: Adapter Entries
items.desc: Flattened configuration by adapter name. Common fields include `defaultModel`, `includeModels`, and `excludeModels`.

noDefaultVibeForgeMcpServer.label: Disable Built-in MCP
noDefaultVibeForgeMcpServer.desc: Do not enable the built-in VibeForge MCP server

type.label: Connection Type

env.label: Environment
env.desc: Environment variables for the MCP server
